title: Dependency Status
description: Status of a single infrastructure dependency (NATS, MongoDB, MinIO, Redis). Used as a value type within the readiness check response.

latencyMs.description: Round-trip latency to the dependency in milliseconds. Only present when status is 'connected'.

error.description: Error message when status is 'disconnected', 'timeout', or 'error'.

lastCheckedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last health check for this dependency.
